title: draba aspera
intro: Draba aspera, also known as Alpine Cress or Draba, is a small, annual or biennial plant belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Draba aspera include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which is often used to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and digestive issues.
